account.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

preview.title: Test as new user
preview.description: Creates a temporary sandbox profile. All data (log, weight, calibration) is automatically deleted when you exit. Your real account is not affected.
preview.activeInfo: You are now navigating as a new user. The banner at the top confirms the mode.
preview.exit: Exit preview and delete test data
